name: superteam
description: Codex plugin that exposes the superteam orchestration skill for issue-driven multi-agent work.

interface.longDescription: Install the Superteam plugin to make the superteam skill importable in Codex as a packaged workflow for design, planning, execution, review, and finish stages.
defaultPrompt: Use $superteam to take issue #1 from design through review-ready execution.
Use $superteam to coordinate a multi-agent implementation plan for this issue.
Use $superteam to resume an issue workflow from planning or execution.
